detaileddescription.para: This file contains the main implementation of the Xilinx HDCP 2.2 RNG device driver. MODIFICATION HISTORY:

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 JO 10/01/15 Initial release. 1.01 MH 08/04/16 Added 64 bit address support. 1.02 MH 02/17/16 Fixed pointer alignment problem in function XHdcp22Rng_GetRandom
